arts.ttl: Chelsea star told to leave in January transfer window after Enzo Maresca talks
arts.sum: Chelsea have enjoyed an impressive first season under Enzo Maresca following his summer move from Leicester but one star in particular has not played as much as he’d have liked

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes Thomas Tuchel point in setting clear target for Enzo Maresca at Chelsea
arts.sum: Liverpool hero Jamie Carragher reckons Enzo Maresca must return Chelsea back into the trophy hunt like Thomas Tuchel managed prior to his appointment. "The appointment of England's new manager is a timely reminder to Chelsea's Enzo Maresca of his immediate challenge; to make his club as good as they were under Thomas Tuchel," he wrote.

arts.ttl: Liverpool could hand former icon transfer blow after 'moving ahead' in £12m race
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly interested in 17-year-old prospect Andrija Maksimovic

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Chelsea Parimatch Offer: Get 60/1 Odds on Cole Palmer to Score!
arts.sum: Claim this huge 60/1 odds boost on Cole Palmer to score anytime against Liverpool today, thanks to the Parimatch sign up offer. The Premier League returns this weekend after the international break, ...

arts.ttl: Osimhen to Chelsea? Blues already have "spectacularly special player" to fire Premier League challenge - and it's not Cole Palmer
arts.sum: Ex-Chelsea winger Pat Nevin tells Sports Mole that the Blues can cope without adding another striker, backing Cole Palmer and co to fire them towards the top four.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Chelsea: Mohamed Salah's record against the Blues before Anfield reunion
arts.sum: Ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Liverpool and Chelsea, Sports Mole takes a closer look at Mohamed Salah's record against the Blues.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister absence from Liverpool training photos explained as two more missing
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister is a concern for Liverpool after struggling recently with a groin problem

arts.ttl: Ryan Gravenberch explains Arne Slot phone call that turned him into Liverpool's breakout star
arts.sum: Ryan Gravenberch interview: The Liverpool midfielder discusses how street football with his brother prepared him for the professional game and who he idolised when he was young

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea now looking at international defender, he could replace £200k-a-week player at Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: Chelsea are now being linked with a new name in the transfer rumour mill as a potential defensive target. There’s pretty much at least two...
